info.title: Aspirate
info.description: Automatic kustomize manifest generation for applications powered by the Microsoft .Net Aspire Cloud framework.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initializes aspirate settings within your AppHost directory.

commands.name: run
commands.description: Builds, pushes containers, and runs the current solution directly against a kubernetes cluster.

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stops a deployment that has been made using 'aspirate run' by destroying it.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Builds, pushes containers, generates aspire manifest, helm chart and kustomize manifests.

commands.name: apply
commands.description: Apply the generated kustomize manifest to the cluster.

commands.name: destroy
commands.description: Removes the manifests from your cluster..
